vocab.sentence: Rachel is hoping that time travel will become a reality.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Rachel 希望時光旅行能成為現實。

vocab.sentence: Melody added a sticker to her message to show her feelings.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Melody 在她的訊息中加了一張貼紙來表達她的感受。

vocab.sentence: I liked the performance because it had great sound effects.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我喜歡這場表演，因為它有很棒的音效。

vocab.sentence: Young people often care a lot about their appearance.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 年輕人通常很在乎他們的外表。

vocab.sentence: This music event is huge. More than 20 bands are involved in it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這場音樂盛會規模龐大。超過 20 個樂團參與其中。

vocab.sentence: The old house looked scary in the dark.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這棟老房子在黑暗中看起來很可怕。

vocab.sentence: In the game, the players are left in the wild and must find food to live.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 在遊戲中，玩家被留在荒野，必須尋找食物才能生存。

vocab.sentence: On the Internet, we can find information about almost everything.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 在網路上，我們幾乎可以找到關於任何事情的資訊。

vocab.sentence: To our surprise, there are many love scenes in this scary movie.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 令我們驚訝的是，這部恐怖片裡有很多愛情場景。

vocab.sentence: In the past, images on TV were only black and white.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 過去，電視上的影像只有黑白的。

vocab.sentence: Customers need to pay more if they want extra cheese on their pizzas.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果顧客想要在披薩上加額外的起司，他們需要付更多錢。

vocab.sentence: Tim is very curious about what his online friend looks like.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Tim 對他的網友長什麼樣子感到很好奇。

vocab.sentence: Many tourists like to take a glass-bottom boat to explore the ocean.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多遊客喜歡搭乘玻璃底船來探索海洋。

vocab.sentence: With the help of artists, the old station developed into a new attraction.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 在藝術家的幫助下，這座舊車站發展成了一個新景點。

phrases.sentence: I would really like to enjoy some late-night snacks. On the other hand, I don't want to put on weight.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我真的很想享受一些宵夜。另一方面，我不想變胖。

phrases.sentence: Selina will come to our barbecue party. As for Hebe, she is still thinking about that.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Selina 會來我們的烤肉派對。至於 Hebe，她還在考慮。

phrases.sentence: David never buys shoes online because he cannot try them on.
phrases.sentence_chinese: David 從不在網路上買鞋，因為他無法試穿。

phrases.sentence: I downloaded several kinds of apps. For instance, there were camera apps and game apps.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我下載了幾種應用程式。例如，有相機應用程式和遊戲應用程式。

phrases.sentence: Although "pudding ramen" sounds strange, I would love to give it a try.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 雖然「布丁拉麵」聽起來很奇怪，但我想試試看。

tips.label: 使役動詞
tips.text: make / let / have + O (受詞) + V (原形動詞)

tips.label: if 條件子句
tips.text: If + S + V (現在簡單式), S + Aux (助動詞) + V (原形動詞)

notes.title: 使役動詞 (Causative Verbs)
notes.rule: 這三個使役動詞都有「使、讓」的意思，表示「主動」促使受詞做某事，後面的動詞一律使用「原形動詞」。
notes.description: make (強迫、要求，語氣最強)；have (交付、吩咐，通常指透過指示讓某人做某事)；let (允許、同意，語氣最弱)。
examples: The scary movie scene made me cry. (那可怕的電影場景讓我哭了。)
The teacher had the students explore the wild. (老師讓學生們去探索荒野。)
My mom let me add extra cheese to the pizza. (我媽媽讓我給披薩加額外的起司。)

notes.title: if 條件子句 (Conditional Clauses)
notes.rule: 以現在簡單式代替未來式
notes.description: 當 if 帶出的子句用來表達「未來可能發生」的真實條件時，if 所在的條件子句要用「現在簡單式」，而主要子句則維持表示未來的「助動詞 + 原形動詞」。
examples: If Roy finds any wild animals, he will inform the center. (如果 Roy 發現任何野生動物，他會通知中心。)
If you care about your appearance, you can try on these clothes. (如果你在乎你的外表，你可以試穿這些衣服。)

quiz.question: The director made the actors ________ the scary scene again and again.
quiz.hint: make 為使役動詞，表示「強迫、要求」，後面受詞主動做某事時需接「原形動詞」。

quiz.question: If time travel ________ a reality one day, I will visit the future.
quiz.hint: if 引導的條件子句表示未來可能發生的情況時，需「以現在簡單式代替未來式」。主詞為單數，動詞加 -s。

quiz.question: My mom usually lets me ________ extra cheese to my pizza.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，表示「允許」，後面受詞主動做某事時需接「原形動詞」。

quiz.question: The teacher had the students ________ information about wild animals online.
quiz.hint: have 為使役動詞，表示「交付、吩咐」，後面受詞主動做某事時需接「原形動詞」。

quiz.question: If the game ________ too scary, we can stop playing it.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句以現在簡單式代替未來式，主詞 the game 為第三人稱單數，用 is。

quiz.question: The amazing sound effects made the audience ________ they were in a real war.
quiz.hint: make 為使役動詞，後面受詞主動做某事時需接「原形動詞」。

quiz.question: If you ________ curious about the old house, you can explore it yourself.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句以現在簡單式代替未來式，主詞 you 搭配 be 動詞 are。

quiz.question: The tour guide won't let the tourists ________ the wild alone.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，無論時態為何，後面的受詞補語一律接「原形動詞」。

quiz.question: The designer had his assistant ________ the appearance of the website.
quiz.hint: have 作為使役動詞，後接受詞主動做某事，需接「原形動詞」。

quiz.question: If she ________ more time, she will give this new app a try.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式。主詞 she 為第三人稱單數，動詞用 has。

quiz.question: The sad news made everyone involved in the project ________ bad.
quiz.hint: make 作為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 feel。

quiz.question: If it ________ heavily tomorrow, the outdoor concert will be canceled.
quiz.hint: if 引導的條件子句表示未來可能發生的情況時，需「以現在簡單式代替未來式」。

quiz.question: Please let me ________ on this beautiful dress before buying it.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，表示允許，後接原形動詞 try。

quiz.question: The manager had the IT team ________ the new software.
quiz.hint: have 為使役動詞，後接受詞主動做某事，需接原形動詞。

quiz.question: If Jason ________ the rules, he won't be allowed to join the game.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式。主詞 Jason 的否定助動詞用 doesn't。

quiz.question: The strict coach made the players ________ for three extra hours.
quiz.hint: make 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 run。

quiz.question: If the images ________ blurry, we will ask the photographer to take them again.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句以現在簡單式代替未來式。主詞 images 為複數，用 are。

quiz.question: Her parents finally let her ________ the music festival.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 attend。

quiz.question: I will have my brother ________ the extra boxes to your room.
quiz.hint: have 為使役動詞，受詞 my brother 主動做動作，接原形動詞 carry。

quiz.question: If you ________ to know more details, you can visit our website.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式。主詞 you 後面的動詞不加 -s。

quiz.question: The scary story made the little boy ________ to sleep alone.
quiz.hint: make 作為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 refuse。

quiz.question: If the weather ________ nice this weekend, we might go hiking in the wild.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句表未來可能發生的事，需用現在簡單式。

quiz.question: Please don't let anyone ________ this confidential information.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 see。

quiz.question: The teacher had the students ________ their homework before Friday.
quiz.hint: have 作為使役動詞，受詞主動動作接原形動詞 finish。

quiz.question: If you ________ carefully, you won't make the same mistake again.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式代替未來式。

quiz.question: The surprising ending of the movie made everyone ________ out loud.
quiz.hint: make 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 cry。

quiz.question: If he ________ not apologize, I will never speak to him again.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式。主詞 he 的助動詞用 does。

quiz.question: I will let you ________ my camera if you promise to be careful.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 use。

quiz.question: The mother had her son ________ up his room before going out.
quiz.hint: have 為使役動詞，受詞主動做動作，接原形動詞 clean。

quiz.question: If you ________ about your health, you should exercise more.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式代替未來式。

quiz.question: The heavy rain made us ________ our plans for the weekend.
quiz.hint: make 作為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 cancel。

quiz.question: If the extra service ________ too much, we won't use it.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式。主詞 service 為單數，動詞需加 -s。

quiz.question: The museum doesn't let visitors ________ photos inside.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 take。

quiz.question: We had the guide ________ us around the historical scenes.
quiz.hint: have 作為使役動詞，受詞主動做動作，接原形動詞 show。

quiz.question: If Jane ________ tomorrow, we will have the party without her.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式代替未來式。否定助動詞用 doesn't。

quiz.question: His poor appearance made people ________ he was a beggar.
quiz.hint: make 作為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 think。

quiz.question: If they ________ early, they can catch the first train.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式代替未來式。

quiz.question: The principal let the students ________ early because of the typhoon.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 go。

quiz.question: I had my friend ________ me a message when he arrived safely.
quiz.hint: have 為使役動詞，受詞 my friend 主動做動作，接原形動詞 send。

quiz.question: If the information ________ true, we have a big problem.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句以現在簡單式代替未來式，information 為不可數名詞，搭配 is。

quiz.question: The boss made his employees ________ overtime to finish the project.
quiz.hint: make 作為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 work。

quiz.question: If you ________ more about the reality, you will be disappointed.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式代替未來式。

quiz.question: Please let me ________ if you need any extra help.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 know。

quiz.question: The doctor had the nurse ________ the patient's blood pressure.
quiz.hint: have 為使役動詞，受詞主動做動作，接原形動詞 check。

quiz.question: If he ________ the competition, he will be famous.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式。主詞 he 為單數，動詞需加 -s。

quiz.question: The exciting music made the party animals ________ all night.
quiz.hint: make 作為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 dance。

quiz.question: If you ________ tell me the truth, I won't be able to help you.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式。you 的否定助動詞用 don't。

quiz.question: My dad won't let me ________ his new car.
quiz.hint: let 為使役動詞，後接原形動詞 drive。

quiz.question: The author had his publisher ________ the book cover.
quiz.hint: have 為使役動詞，受詞主動做動作，接原形動詞 redesign。

quiz.question: If Mary ________ a lot of money, she will travel around the world.
quiz.hint: if 條件子句用現在簡單式代替未來式。主詞 Mary 為單數，動詞加 -s。

vocab.sentence: Rachel is hoping that time travel will become a reality.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Rachel 希望時光旅行能成為現實。

vocab.sentence: Melody added a sticker to her message to show her feelings.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Melody 在她的訊息中加了一張貼紙來表達她的感受。

vocab.sentence: I liked the performance because it had great sound effects.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我喜歡這場表演，因為它有很棒的音效。

vocab.sentence: Young people often care a lot about their appearance.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 年輕人通常很在乎他們的外表。

vocab.sentence: This music event is huge. More than 20 bands are involved in it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這場音樂盛會規模龐大。超過 20 個樂團參與其中。

vocab.sentence: The old house looked scary in the dark.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這棟老房子在黑暗中看起來很可怕。

vocab.sentence: In the game, the players are left in the wild and must find food to live.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 在遊戲中，玩家被留在荒野，必須尋找食物才能生存。

vocab.sentence: On the Internet, we can find information about almost everything.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 在網路上，我們幾乎可以找到關於任何事情的資訊。

vocab.sentence: To our surprise, there are many love scenes in this scary movie.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 令我們驚訝的是，這部恐怖片裡有很多愛情場景。

vocab.sentence: In the past, images on TV were only black and white.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 過去，電視上的影像只有黑白的。

vocab.sentence: Customers need to pay more if they want extra cheese on their pizzas.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果顧客想要在披薩上加額外的起司，他們需要付更多錢。

vocab.sentence: Tim is very curious about what his online friend looks like.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Tim 對他的網友長什麼樣子感到很好奇。

vocab.sentence: Many tourists like to take a glass-bottom boat to explore the ocean.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多遊客喜歡搭乘玻璃底船來探索海洋。

vocab.sentence: With the help of artists, the old station developed into a new attraction.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 在藝術家的幫助下，這座舊車站發展成了一個新景點。

phrases.sentence: I would really like to enjoy some late-night snacks. On the other hand, I don't want to put on weight.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我真的很想享受一些宵夜。另一方面，我不想變胖。

phrases.sentence: Selina will come to our barbecue party. As for Hebe, she is still thinking about that.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Selina 會來我們的烤肉派對。至於 Hebe，她還在考慮。

phrases.sentence: David never buys shoes online because he cannot try them on.
phrases.sentence_chinese: David 從不在網路上買鞋，因為他無法試穿。

phrases.sentence: I downloaded several kinds of apps. For instance, there were camera apps and game apps.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我下載了幾種應用程式。例如，有相機應用程式和遊戲應用程式。

phrases.sentence: Although "pudding ramen" sounds strange, I would love to give it a try.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 雖然「布丁拉麵」聽起來很奇怪，但我想試試看。

grammar.sentence: The scary movie made the girl cry.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這部可怕的電影讓那個女孩哭了。

grammar.sentence: The teacher had the students clean the classroom.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 老師讓學生們打掃教室。

grammar.sentence: My mother let me watch TV after dinner.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我媽媽讓我晚飯後看電視。

grammar.sentence: The bad weather made us stay at home.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 壞天氣使我們待在家裡。

grammar.sentence: The manager had his secretary send the email.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 經理讓他的秘書發送電子郵件。

grammar.sentence: Her parents won't let her go to the wild alone.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她的父母不讓她獨自去荒野。

grammar.sentence: The sad story made everyone feel down.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個悲傷的故事讓每個人都感到沮喪。

grammar.sentence: The doctor had the patient take a rest.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 醫生讓病人休息一下。

grammar.sentence: Please let me try on this jacket.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 請讓我試穿這件夾克。

grammar.sentence: The funny joke made the whole class laugh.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個好笑的笑話讓全班都笑了。

grammar.sentence: The coach had the team run five miles.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 教練讓球隊跑了五英里。

grammar.sentence: My dad let me explore the new city.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我爸爸讓我探索這座新城市。

grammar.sentence: The loud noise made the baby wake up.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 巨大的噪音把嬰兒吵醒了。

grammar.sentence: I had my brother carry the heavy bags.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我讓我弟弟拿那些重袋子。

grammar.sentence: They let the animals live in the wild freely.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們讓動物們在野外自由生活。

grammar.sentence: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果明天下雨，我們就待在家裡。

grammar.sentence: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果你努力學習，你就會通過考試。

grammar.sentence: If she visits the website, she can find the information.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果她造訪這個網站，她就能找到資訊。

grammar.sentence: If you add extra sugar, the tea will taste better.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果你多加點糖，茶會更好喝。

grammar.sentence: If the weather is good, we may go hiking.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果天氣好，我們可能會去健行。

grammar.sentence: If he finds the missing dog, he will inform you.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果他找到那隻走失的狗，他會通知你。

grammar.sentence: If you are curious, you can give it a try.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果你很好奇，你可以試試看。

grammar.sentence: If they wake up early, they can catch the train.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果他們早起，他們就能趕上火車。

grammar.sentence: If I have enough money, I will buy a new phone.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果我有足夠的錢，我就會買一支新手機。

grammar.sentence: If the player finds the box, he will get a prize.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果玩家找到箱子，他就會得到獎品。

grammar.sentence: If she feels sick, she should see a doctor.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果她覺得不舒服，她應該去看醫生。

grammar.sentence: If you care about your appearance, you can try this.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果你在乎你的外表，你可以試試這個。

grammar.sentence: If we leave now, we will arrive on time.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果我們現在出發，我們就會準時到達。

grammar.sentence: If he tells the truth, I will forgive him.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果他說實話，我就會原諒他。

grammar.sentence: If you want more details, I can show you the images.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 如果你想要更多細節，我可以給你看圖片。
